Detailed Description

Internal implementation of the default Calendar class

Definition at line 29 of file VMCalendar.java.

Constructor & Destructor Documentation

jelatine::VMCalendar::VMCalendar (  )  [inline]

Constructs a new GregorianCalender representing the current time, using the default time zone and the default locale.

Definition at line 76 of file VMCalendar.java.

References java::util::Calendar::complete(), and java::util::Calendar::setTimeInMillis().
